text:
miwi        2007-12-12 12:58:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-DateTime-Event-Lunar Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module calculates the time and date of certain recurring lunar events,
  including new moons and specific lunar phases.
  
  Author: Daisuke Maki <dmaki@cpan.org>
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/~DMAKI/DateTime-Event-Lunar/
  
  PR:             ports/117815
  Submitted by:   Masahiro Teramoto <markun at onohara.to>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2921    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/p5-DateTime-Event-Lunar/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-DateTime-Event-Lunar/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-DateTime-Event-Lunar/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-DateTime-Event-Lunar/pkg-plist (new)
